assertions.title: Docker build succeeds with updated dependency

steps.action: Run docker compose ps to check container status
steps.expected: All 4 chain containers built and running
steps.observed: All 4 containers (ypm-ethereum, ypm-arbitrum, ypm-optimism, ypm-base) running with status 'Up (healthy)', images built ~21 minutes ago

steps.action: Run docker compose images to check image build
steps.expected: Images exist for all chain services
steps.observed: Images exist: ypm-ethereum (1.44GB), ypm-arbitrum (1.44GB), ypm-optimism (1.44GB), ypm-base (1.44GB), all tagged latest

evidence.dockerComposePs: All 4 chain containers healthy, nginx running
evidence.dockerComposeImages: All 4 chain images built successfully (1.44GB each)

steps.action: Check docker compose logs ypm-ethereum for startup sequence
steps.expected: Logs show brownie connect, dank_mids patch, and successful import
steps.observed: Logs show: 'brownie_connected network_id=ethereum-custom', 'dank_mids_patched', 'chain_connected block=24571919 chain=ethereum chain_id=1', 'Application startup complete', 'Uvicorn running on http://0.0.0.0:8001'

evidence.startupLogs: Sequence: network registered -> brownie_connected -> dank_mids_patched -> chain_connected (block=24571919, chain_id=1) -> Application startup complete -> Uvicorn running
evidence.noImportErrors: No import errors or tracebacks in startup logs

assertions.title: Existing price lookup works after upgrade

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with correct price response shape
All chain health endpoints include 'synced' field
steps.observed: All 4 chains return synced:true - ethereum (block 24572024), arbitrum (block 437660954), optimism (block 148441517), base (block 42846232)

steps.expected: Test passes: when check_node_async raises NodeNotSynced, health returns 200 with synced:false
steps.observed: Test PASSED. Unit test mocks check_node_async to raise NodeNotSynced('Node is behind'), verifies response is 200 with synced=false

steps.expected: Test passes: when chain.height fails entirely, health returns 503
steps.observed: Test PASSED. Unit test mocks chain height property to raise Exception, verifies response is 503

steps.action: curl GET /health and verify response fields
steps.expected: Response retains status, chain, block fields; synced is additive
steps.observed: Response has all expected fields: status='ok', chain='ethereum', block=24572021, synced=true

steps.action: Verify all 4 chain health endpoints have same field structure
steps.expected: All chains return {status, chain, block, synced}
steps.observed: All 4 chains return consistent {status, chain, block, synced} structure

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. Docker build succeeds (all 4 chain containers healthy). Server starts correctly with updated ypricemagic (brownie connects, dank_mids patches, chain connects). Existing price lookups work (USDC at block 18000000 returns price 1.0). Health endpoint includes new 'synced' field across all 4 chains. Unit tests confirm synced=false on NodeNotSynced, 503 on RPC failure, and existing field preservation.
